name: Decadent Chocolate Brownies w/ Port Cream Beringer Vineya
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Generously butter an 8-inch by 13-inch medium baking pan.
3. Chop chocolate into bits and heat with butter in a double boiler until completely melted. Remove from heat and stir in sugar to partially dissolve.
4. Beat eggs with vanilla extract.
5. In a separate bowl, stir together flour and salt.
6. Stir the beaten eggs into the melted chocolate mixture, then stir in the flour mixture and walnuts until combined. Do not over stir.
7. Spread batter evenly into the buttered pan.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes (or 40 minutes for chewier brownies) or until set.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting.
10. Serve with a dollop of Port Cream.
11. To prepare Port Cream, simmer the Cabernet Port wine over medium-high heat until reduced to 1/4 cup. Chill, then beat the cream until just thickening. Gradually stream in sugar, reduced Port wine, and vanilla extract, continuing to beat until soft peaks form.
